string.text: The Ruger Mini-14 is a lightweight, semi-automatic rifle chambered in 5.56x45mm NATO cartridge, with a 30-rounds magazine. In production and service since 1973, the Mini-14 is heavily based on the M14 itself, looking very much alike, making people call it its Little Brother, despite the fact that neither the M14 nor the Mini-14 share their respective gas system designs. Still, to be considered as such, this weapon can be seen as a lighter M14 that also uses a lighter round, but still deadly enough, as well as a lot more reliable.
